transcription.text: Introducing new Zestier Hamburger Helper Lasagna. First a savory sausage seasoning that's a more Italian touch. Now we add some more spice so it's zesty and nice with a taste you love so much. Our rich tomato sauce makes a hearty meal for you. Served on noodles so curly you'll know that it's surely lasagna through and through. Our new lasagna turns your plain hamburger into a real Italian meal that's more delicious than ever. Hamburger Helper, Helper, Hamburger Helper, make a great meal.

metadata.title: 1983 Hamburger Helper Lasagna Zestier and More delicious then ever
